name: Asian Rice and Lentil Patties (Betty Crocker)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup dried lentils, sorted and washed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat rice, lentils, and water to boiling in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer for 30 to 40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lentils are tender and water is absorbed.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Mash the rice mixture with a fork.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients to form a cohesive mixture.
6. Shape into 4 rounds about 1/2 inch thick.
7. Spray a 10-inch skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
8. Cook patties in the skillet for about 10 minutes, turning once, until golden brown. Remove from the skillet and keep warm.
9. In the same skillet, heat all ingredients to boiling; reduce heat to medium.
10. Cover and cook for up to 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are crisp-tender.
11. Add patties to the skillet. Cover and cook over medium heat for about 5 to 8 minutes or until patties are hot.
12. Serve sauce and patties over noodles or rice with a green vegetable alongside.
[210 Cals, 55 cals from fat; 6g total fat.]
